column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="Looking up as petals dance in the wind" | TEXT="綺麗ですね" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Catching a petal elegantly" | TEXT="つかまえた" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling purely amidst dancing petals" | TEXT="春霞" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Closing eyes, feeling the breeze" | TEXT="心地よい" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Holding kimono sleeves against the wind" | TEXT="風が強い" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Laughing as a petal lands on nose" | TEXT="くすぐったい" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Pointing to the floral snow" | TEXT="桜吹雪" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Spinning lightly with the wind" | TEXT="舞い散る" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Looking back warmly" | TEXT="ずっと見ていたい"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Running playfully through dancing petals" | TEXT="待ってー" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Looking amazed with hands clasped" | TEXT="うわぁ…" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Blowing a petal from hand" | TEXT="ふーっ" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Tilting head gracefully" | TEXT="どうしたの？" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Covering mouth, giggling" | TEXT="ふふふ" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Nodding knowingly" | TEXT="そうですね" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Wiping a sudden tear" | TEXT="なんだか泣ける" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling brightly" | TEXT="元気出していこう" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Waving cheerfully" | TEXT="また明日"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Looking confused as a petal covers eye" | TEXT="前が見えない" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Brushing off petals from shoulder" | TEXT="よいしょ" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Looking down apologetically" | TEXT="ごめんなさい" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Sighing softly" | TEXT="はぁ" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Clapping hands gently" | TEXT="お見事！" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Giving a thumbs up" | TEXT="いいね！" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Patting chest safely" | TEXT="よかった" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Bowing deeply" | TEXT="感謝いたします" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Showing an OK sign" | TEXT="了解！"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Holding a broom, sweeping petals temporarily" | TEXT="お掃除お掃除" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Looking tired, wiping sweat" | TEXT="ふう" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Looking proud with hands on hips" | TEXT="綺麗になった！" P4: ACTION/PROPS="More petals fall immediately" | TEXT="あーあ…" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Laughing at the situation" | TEXT="仕方ないね" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Offering a cup of tea" | TEXT="一服どうぞ" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Pouting slightly" | TEXT="もう" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Winking playfully" | TEXT="内緒だよ" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Looking up happily" | TEXT="まあいっか"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Holding an umbrella to block petals" | TEXT="すごい舞ってる" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Peeking from behind the umbrella" | TEXT="ちらっ" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Looking worried" | TEXT="寒くない？" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Wrapping a scarf around" | TEXT="あたたかい" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Holding hands out playfully" | TEXT="ぎゅーっ" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Blushing deeply" | TEXT="恥ずかしいな" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Looking at phone happily" | TEXT="連絡きた" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Typing quickly" | TEXT="今行くね" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Running towards camera" | TEXT="お待たせ！"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Walking gracefully on a petal carpet" | TEXT="花の絨毯" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Stopping to pick up a perfect flower" | TEXT="これあげる" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Yawning sleepily" | TEXT="ふわぁ" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Rubbing eyes" | TEXT="眠い…" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Stretching elegantly" | TEXT="うーん" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Looking determined softly" | TEXT="よし、がんばる" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Bowing to say goodbye" | TEXT="失礼します" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Waving gently" | TEXT="さようなら" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Sleeping happily" | TEXT="おやすみなさい"
